name: gqa_paged_prefill_causal_h32_kv16_d128_ps64
description: Batched Grouped Query Attention prefill with a paged KV cache (page_size=64). Causal mask is applied. Captured from Gemma 3 27B. GQA ratio 2:1.

num_kv_indices.description: Total number of KV page indices.

kv_indptr.description: KV page offsets for each sequence.

kv_indices.description: Page IDs for KV cache lookups.

kv_last_page_len.description: Number of valid tokens in the last page of each sequence.

reference:
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
import math


@torch.no_grad()
def run(q, k_cache, v_cache, qo_indptr, kv_indptr, kv_indices, kv_last_page_len, sm_scale):
    total_q, num_qo_heads, head_dim = q.shape
    num_pages_total, page_size, num_kv_heads, _ = k_cache.shape
    len_indptr = qo_indptr.shape[0]

    # Check constants
    assert num_qo_heads == 32
    assert num_kv_heads == 16
    assert head_dim == 128
    assert page_size == 64

    # Check constraints
    assert total_q == qo_indptr[-1].item()

    device = q.device
    batch_size = len_indptr - 1
    gqa_ratio = num_qo_heads // num_kv_heads

    output = torch.zeros((total_q, num_qo_heads, head_dim), dtype=torch.bfloat16, device=device)
    lse = torch.full((total_q, num_qo_heads), -float("inf"), dtype=torch.float32, device=device)

    for b in range(batch_size):
        q_start = int(qo_indptr[b].item())
        q_end = int(qo_indptr[b + 1].item())
        if q_start >= q_end:
            continue

        kv_start = int(kv_indptr[b].item())
        kv_end = int(kv_indptr[b + 1].item())
        last_len = int(kv_last_page_len[b].item())

        page_ids = kv_indices[kv_start:kv_end].long()
        n_pages = page_ids.shape[0]
        n_full = n_pages - 1
        n_kv = n_full * page_size + last_len

        # Gather KV pages into contiguous tensors
        k_list = []
        v_list = []
        for p_idx, pid in enumerate(page_ids):
            if p_idx < n_full:
                k_list.append(k_cache[pid])
                v_list.append(v_cache[pid])
            else:
                k_list.append(k_cache[pid, :last_len])
                v_list.append(v_cache[pid, :last_len])
        k_seq = torch.cat(k_list, dim=0)  # [n_kv, num_kv_heads, head_dim]
        v_seq = torch.cat(v_list, dim=0)  # [n_kv, num_kv_heads, head_dim]

        q_seq = q[q_start:q_end]  # [n_q, num_qo_heads, head_dim]
        n_q = q_seq.shape[0]
        delta = n_kv - n_q

        # Expand KV for GQA: repeat each KV head gqa_ratio times
        k_gqa = k_seq.permute(1, 0, 2).repeat_interleave(gqa_ratio, dim=0)  # [num_qo_heads, n_kv, head_dim]
        v_gqa = v_seq.permute(1, 0, 2).repeat_interleave(gqa_ratio, dim=0)  # [num_qo_heads, n_kv, head_dim]
        q_t = q_seq.permute(1, 0, 2)  # [num_qo_heads, n_q, head_dim]

        # Compute attention logits in float32
        logits = torch.bmm(q_t.float(), k_gqa.float().transpose(1, 2)) * sm_scale  # [num_qo_heads, n_q, n_kv]

        # Apply causal mask
        q_idx = torch.arange(n_q, device=device).unsqueeze(1)
        kv_idx = torch.arange(n_kv, device=device).unsqueeze(0)
        causal_mask = kv_idx > (q_idx + delta)
        logits = logits.masked_fill(causal_mask.unsqueeze(0), float("-inf"))

        # Compute log-sum-exp (2-based) and attention output
        lse_val = torch.logsumexp(logits, dim=-1) / math.log(2.0)  # [num_qo_heads, n_q]
        attn_w = torch.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
        out = torch.bmm(attn_w, v_gqa.float())  # [num_qo_heads, n_q, head_dim]

        output[q_start:q_end] = out.permute(1, 0, 2).to(torch.bfloat16)
        lse[q_start:q_end] = lse_val.permute(1, 0)

    return output, lse
